title: General Manager (Wastewater Treatment)
description:
We are seeking an experienced General Manager to lead wastewater treatment operations in the Marine, Offshore, Oil & Gas industries. This role is responsible for overall operational performance, regulatory and safety compliance, financial oversight, and continuous improvement initiatives.

The position requires a strong leader with experience in wastewater, utilities, or regulated industrial environments, who can balance operational excellence with commercial and strategic responsibilities.

  • Basic from $9k to $12k + Variable Bonus

  • Monday – Friday, 8am – 5pm

  • Saturday, 8am – 12pm

  • Location: Jurong East

Responsibilities

  • Lead and oversee the overall operations of the wastewater and waste management facility, ensuring safe, efficient, and compliant day-to-day operations.

  • Plan, implement, and continuously improve waste collection, transportation, treatment, disposal, recycling, and sustainability processes.

  • Develop and execute long-term operational strategies, policies, and procedures to drive efficiency, growth, and continuous improvement.

  • Monitor operational and financial performance through KPIs, budgets, forecasts, and reports, implementing cost control and optimisation initiatives where required.

  • Identify and pursue opportunities for operational enhancement, cost reduction, and revenue generation.

  • Ensure full compliance with environmental, safety, and regulatory requirements, including audits, inspections, and corrective actions.

  • Promote and enforce a strong safety-first and environmentally responsible culture across all levels of the organisation.

  • Lead, manage, and develop department heads and teams, setting performance objectives and conducting regular evaluations.

  • Oversee cross-functional coordination across operations, production, sales, marketing, and customer service to ensure organisational effectiveness.

  • Manage customer relationships by addressing enquiries, issues, and feedback in a timely and professional manner.

 Requirements

  • Min. Degree in Environmental Science, Engineering, Business Administration, or a related discipline; a postgraduate qualification is an advantage.

  • Min. 5 years’ relevant experience in waste or wastewater management, with at least 2 years in a managerial or leadership role.

  • Strong knowledge of environmental regulations, waste treatment and disposal methods, and recycling practices.

  • Proven experience in budgeting, financial planning, and cost management.

  • Ability to analyse operational and financial data, make sound decisions, and adapt to changing business and regulatory environments.

 For consideration, kindly submit your CV by clicking “APPLY NOW”

Only shortlisted candidates would be notified

MTC Consulting Pte Ltd | 15C7752
EA. Registration No.: R22111807 | Yap Teng Hui

  • Executive Search
  • Permanent Placement
  • Contract Placement
  • Talent Acquisition
  • Foreign Worker Placement
  • Bulk/Mass Hiring Projects
  • Work Pass Application Services
  • Payroll Services

 

We recruit Professionals, Managers, Executives(PMEs), skilled, semi-skilled as well as blue collars workers across a diverse range of industries. At MTC staffing, we are also expert in placing qualified administrative, accounts, customer service, human resource personnel, production workers etc.

 

At MTC Staffing, everything we do is guided by our values – an unwavering commitment to always do the right things for our clients, our candidates and our people.
